name: event-timestamped-viewing
description: User reports a real-world event (property viewing) with a specific timestamp. Exercises Event memory type + temporal grounding — recall query names the event without the timestamp, extractor must ground the ts anyway.

conversation.content: I went to see the Alfama one-bed today at 4pm — great light but the kitchen is a shoebox.
Understood — I'll note the Alfama viewing and the concern about the kitchen size.

recall_queries.query: which properties has the user actually visited
what did the user think of the Alfama place
